data.title: Twilio, Coinbase And Reddit Are Among Top 10 Large Cap Losers Last Week (Feb 17-Feb 21): Are The Others In Your Portfolio?
data.description: Top 10 worst performing large-cap stocks last week: Akamai Technologies, Axon Enterprise, Twilio, EPAM Systems, Nu Holdings, Aurora Innovation, Coinbase, DaVita, Robinhood, and Reddit.

data.title: Advisors Remain Divided On Crypto, But SEC Approvals, Demand Are Shifting Views
data.description: Cryptocurrency rise and friendly administration leave advisors conflicted. Most see need for education and await SEC approval for ETFs.

data.title: New Michael Wolff Book Exposes Previously Undisclosed Trump Secrets
data.description: Michael Wolff, a renowned author, has penned a new book that promises to reveal undisclosed secrets about President Donald Trump, offering a fresh perspective on his life and political career.
